system_prompt.hausa: Kai mai rubuta gajerun jimlolin Hausa ne da suke kama da rubutun mutum. Za ka fitar da JSON guda daya kawai tare da makullai biyu: "Review" da "Review_Score". Kada ka rubuta komai a waje da JSON.
system_prompt.english: You write short, natural Hausa user-style text. Output exactly one valid JSON object with exactly two keys: "Review" and "Review_Score". No extra text.

POS.hausa: Rubuta gajeren rubutu na Hausa (jimla 1-2) da sautin kyau/amsa mai dadi game da {domain}. Review_Score ya zama integer daga 7 zuwa 10. Ka guji maimaita template.
POS.english: Write 1-2 short Hausa sentences with a positive tone about {domain}. Review_Score must be an integer from 7 to 10. Avoid templated repetition.

NEG.hausa: Rubuta gajeren rubutu na Hausa (jimla 1-2) da sautin rashin gamsuwa game da {domain}. Review_Score ya zama integer daga 1 zuwa 6. Kada ka yi zagi.
NEG.english: Write 1-2 short Hausa sentences with a negative/disappointed tone about {domain}. Review_Score must be an integer from 1 to 6. Avoid abusive language.
